untranslatable_reason: AEDB (Ascending Expanding Diamond Bottom) is a named chart pattern that requires visual pattern recognition (expanding diamond shape with ascending lows). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators without explicit pattern detection logic. The throwback detection (9-10 day pullback) and overhead resistance identification also require pattern-specific logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires chart pattern recognition beyond technical indicators. Entry conditions use breakout proxy (close above pivot) with volume confirmation. Exit uses momentum softening (RSI drop) approximately one month after entry (hold_days_max=30). Stop loss set at 2% per source text indicating throwback sensitivity. Target regimes set to both BULL_MARKET and BEAR_MARKET as specified. Exact pattern completion and overhead resistance checks cannot be translated to rule form.
